Alesia.Name: Alesia
Alesia.Description: Skilled archer and monster hunter from Castle Village who helps Marlon and the Adventurer's Guild.

Andy.Name: Andy
Andy.Description: Gruff elderly farmer at Fairhaven Farm; stubborn, traditional, and knowledgeable about farming and foraging.

Apples.Name: Apples
Apples.Description: Energetic young Junimo living at Aurora Vineyard, which she reshaped into a magical forest home.

Camilla.Name: Camilla
Camilla.Description: Powerful witch from Castle Village who protects the region and sometimes aids the farmer.

Claire.Name: Claire
Claire.Description: Shy JojaMart worker who later works at the movie theater; dreams of acting and loves dance.

Gunther.Name: Gunther
Gunther.Description: Museum and library curator, serious about archaeology, history, and preserving local culture.

Hank.Name: Hank
Hank.Description: Friendly Grampleton handyman, married to Treyvon and stepfather to Scarlett.

Henchman.Name: Henchman
Henchman.Description: Goblin in the marshlands who resents losing his job with the witch but can become friendlier.

Isaac.Name: Isaac
Isaac.Description: Abrasive but highly skilled Adventurer's Guild warrior active in the badlands.

Jadu.Name: Jadu
Jadu.Description: Aloof desert sentry and adventurer guarding access near Calico Desert.

Jolyne.Name: Jolyne
Jolyne.Description: Fiery leader of the First Slash, an adventurer group protecting the Fern Islands.

Lance.Name: Lance
Lance.Description: Adventurer-researcher from Galdora studying magic relics, crops, and monsters around the valley.

Marlon.Name: Marlon
Marlon.Description: One-eyed leader of the Adventurer's Guild, mentor and weapon supplier for monster hunters.

Martin.Name: Martin
Martin.Description: Kind shy JojaMart worker, Claire's best friend, searching for his birth parents.

Morgan.Name: Morgan
Morgan.Description: Young non-binary apprentice assigned to study magic under the Wizard.

Morris.Name: Morris
Morris.Description: Ambitious Joja manager seeking to expand Joja's influence in the valley.

Olivia.Name: Olivia
Olivia.Description: Wealthy refined widow from the Gotoro Empire; Victor's mother and a part-time stock trader.

Peaches.Name: Peaches
Peaches.Description: Cheerful Junimo, close friend of Apples, often helps with magical starfruit friends.

Scarlett.Name: Scarlett
Scarlett.Description: Warm Grampleton farmhand and Sophia's close friend.

Sophia.Name: Sophia
Sophia.Description: Young pink-haired owner of Blue Moon Vineyard; anxious, anime/cosplay-loving, and grieving her parents.

Susan.Name: Susan
Susan.Description: Elderly farmer at Emerald Farm, skilled in farming and crafting and curious about the world.

Treyvon.Name: Treyvon
Treyvon.Description: Scarlett's father and Hank's husband; runs Treyvon's Essentials in Grampleton.

Victor.Name: Victor
Victor.Description: Olivia's son, engineering graduate from Pellcar University and apprentice bridge engineer.
